# Cloudflare Web Analytics

Get vital web analytics for your website

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).
>
> Use [Cloudflare Web Analytics llms-full.txt](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/llms-full.txt) for the complete Cloudflare Web Analytics documentation in a single file, intended for offline indexing, bulk vectorization, or large-context models.

## Overview

- [Cloudflare Web Analytics](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/index.md): Privacy-first analytics for your website without changing DNS or using Cloudflare proxy.

## About

- [About](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/about/index.md): How Cloudflare Web Analytics collects and processes visitor data.

## Get started

- [Get started](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/get-started/index.md): Set up Cloudflare Web Analytics for your website.
- [Notifications](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/get-started/notifications/index.md): Configure notifications for Web Analytics traffic changes.
- [RUM beacon for Web Analytics](https://developers.cloudflare.com/speed/observatory/rum-beacon/index.md): Add the Web Analytics JavaScript beacon to your site.
- [Web Analytics for SPAs](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/get-started/web-analytics-spa/index.md): Configure Web Analytics for single-page applications.

## Limits

- [Limits](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/limits/index.md): Rate limits and data retention for Web Analytics.

## FAQs

- [FAQs](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/faq/index.md): Answers to common questions about Cloudflare Web Analytics.

## Changelog

- [Changelog](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/changelog/index.md): Track the latest updates and changes to Web Analytics features.

## configuration-options

- [Filters](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/configuration-options/filters/index.md): Learn how to use filters in Cloudflare Web Analytics.
- [Rules](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/configuration-options/rules/index.md): Create rules to include or exclude traffic from Web Analytics.

## data-metrics

- [Core Web Vitals](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/data-metrics/core-web-vitals/index.md): View Core Web Vitals metrics collected by Web Analytics.
- [Data origin and collection](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/data-metrics/data-origin-and-collection/index.md): How Web Analytics collects data from visitor browsers.
- [Dimensions](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/data-metrics/dimensions/index.md): Dimensions available for filtering and grouping Web Analytics data.
- [High-level metrics](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/data-metrics/high-level-metrics/index.md): Page views, visits, and other high-level metrics in Web Analytics.
- [Page load time](https://developers.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/data-metrics/page-load-time-summary/index.md): Page load time metrics collected by Web Analytics.
